play_page.hero_line: Template season for a second city — same protocol as Cedar Rapids, different places and unlock graph. Not live until an operator mints nodes and sets dates.
play_page.meta_description: Template city game season — cooperation-first public object state without tracking players.

map_copy.title: City state
map_copy.subtitle: Weekend board · read-only
map_copy.live_hint: Scan stickers at each place for live signed state — quorum, fragments, and care pauses.
map_copy.wayfinding_intro: Start anywhere — scan any game sticker you find. Planning from home? Search place names in your maps app; the sketch below is districts only, not streets.
map_copy.diagram_note: District sketch only — not a street map. Names and Open in Maps links are how you find places.
map_copy.privacy_note: Same city truth for everyone. No account. No visit log. No GPS tracking.
map_copy.unlock_intro: Paths wake when the city unlocks them together — not when you personally check boxes.

player_guide.hero_subline: Jump to the place list — template nodes with Open in Maps links when live.

steps.title: No required first stop
steps.body: Walk until you spot a game sticker, or pick a place from the list below — any sticker works.

steps.title: Planning from home
steps.body: Search place names in your maps app. The board sketch shows districts, not turn-by-turn directions.

quorum_spot.title: River lantern drop
quorum_spot.body: Template quorum node — scan there for collective progress when the season is live.

map_layout.svg_title: Schematic Example City season nodes and unlock paths

unlock_edges.label: River lantern opens old town arch
